title: Government confirms new tax policy
text: The finance ministry released an official statement with implementation dates and legal references.

title: Scientists discover cure overnight
text: A viral post claims all major diseases were cured in one day without clinical trial records.

title: City council approves transport budget
text: Minutes from the city council meeting show a majority vote approving the yearly transport budget.

title: Celebrity endorses miracle crypto plan
text: Anonymous channels claim guaranteed 500 percent returns with no regulatory filing.

title: University publishes peer reviewed climate report
text: Researchers released methodology and data in an open journal with independent review.

title: Secret agency controls rainfall says blog
text: An unverified article claims weather is manipulated globally by hidden towers.

title: Health department updates vaccination guidance
text: Public health officials updated guidance citing recent epidemiological evidence.

title: Breaking aliens elected as senators
text: A manipulated screenshot with no source claims non humans now hold public office.

title: Court releases official judgment document
text: The judiciary portal published the complete decision and hearing transcript.

title: One herb can replace all medicines
text: A marketing website claims one herb treats every condition and hides ingredients.

title: National statistics bureau posts inflation data
text: Monthly inflation report includes sector wise breakdown and historical comparison.

title: Government plans to ban all cash tomorrow
text: Social media rumor spreads without press release or legal notice.

title: Airport authority announces runway expansion
text: Tender documents and environmental assessments are publicly available.

title: Vaccine contains tracking microchips
text: The claim circulates without lab evidence and cites no credible institution.

title: Education ministry launches scholarship portal
text: Official portal and eligibility criteria were announced during a press briefing.

title: Bank deleting savings accounts at random
text: Chain messages urge panic despite no banking regulator advisory.

title: Meteorological agency issues cyclone warning
text: Forecast bulletin includes coordinates wind speed and emergency procedures.

title: Drinking silver water reverses aging
text: Influencer video makes unsupported medical claims and sells affiliate products.

title: Election commission publishes final turnout
text: The commission dashboard provides polling station level participation numbers.

title: Space laser started forest fires
text: A conspiracy forum attributes wildfires to unidentified orbital weapons.
